name: Preroll & Intros
overview: Play videos from a selected library as prerolls before your TV shows and movies — like studio logos, bumpers, or custom intros.
description: Preroll & Intros lets you designate any Jellyfin library as a source of preroll videos. These videos play automatically before TV show episodes and/or movies, simulating the experience of studio logos, channel bumpers, or custom intros. Configuration is done entirely through the Jellyfin dashboard. Because it uses Jellyfin's server-side intro injection API, it works on every client — Fire TV, Roku, iOS, Android, web browser, and more.

versions.changelog: Workflow fix: triggers on GitHub UI releases, tag pushes, and manual dispatch.
